headline: SK Hynix and Micron lead AI boom, join trillion-dollar club
summary: Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley joins Host Josh Lipton on Market Domination to break down the day’s leading tech stories, including SK Hynix (000660.KS) joining the Trillion-dollar club and Micron Technology (MU) impressive growth in 2026.

headline: Sandisk raised as Barclays says memory/storage ‘the most attractive vertical’
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays analyst Tom O’Malley upgraded Sandisk to Overweight in a note on Wednesday, lifting the stock’s price target to $2,300, arguing that the memory and storage sector is entering a fundamentally different phase driven by long-term contracts, tighter supply, and unprecedented pricing visibility.
